task_description: Fix five upstream harness friction issues from DEX
reflection_q1: Should have started with git diff per file to confirm which fixes were already in local code vs still needed — wasted cycles re-reading unchanged code
reflection_q2: A smarter algorithm would run git diff HEAD <file> before analyzing each file so it only reads the changed sections
reflection_q3: simplify was selected but not needed — no new complex code written; diagnostic flavor would have been lighter and correct
